case_title: MYUNG KYU PARK VS. GOLDEN GATE GLASS AND MIRROR CO.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF'S SON KEVIN PARK INTERPRETS ENGLISH/KOREAN - KOREAN/ENGLISH ON HIS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-10-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE GLASS AND MIRROR CO.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARK, MYUNG KYU AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE GLASS AND MIRROR CO.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE GLASS AND MIRROR CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARK, MYUNG KYU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE GLASS AND MIRROR CO. IN AS MUSH AS DEFENDANT DID NOT CONTRACT WITH PLAINTIFF DIRECTLY TO PROVIDE LABOR AND MATERIALS, THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH A CLAIM AGAINST THIS SPECIFIC DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $402.83 FILED BY PARK, MYUNG KYU AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE GLASS AND MIRROR CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
